hook.summary: A stylus draws a protective shape around a dog to block bees while a narrator claims the game has no ads.
hook.visual_action: Stylus drawing a line around a baseball player silhouette to shield a dog from bees.
hook.text_overlay: Draw lines to save the puppy! Wait a 'save the dog' game with NO ADS?!
hook.voiceover_transcript: Wait, a 'save the dog' game with NO ADS?! I didn't believe it either.

scene_flow: Stylus begins drawing a complex line around a silhouette to protect the dog.
Bees swarm out of a hive and bounce off the drawn barrier.
A 5-second countdown timer appears as the bees continue to attack.
The timer reaches zero, the bees fly away, and a success checkmark appears with confetti.
on_screen_text: Draw lines to save the puppy!
audience_proxy: Casual mobile gamers looking for simple puzzle games without the annoyance of frequent advertisements.
